cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Commodity inputs and carbon costs are priced by normal solver semantics.
input_basis_notes: Commodity quantities migrated from residual calibration source data native_quantity_2025 fields; the demand anchor is 1 residual_activity so coefficients equal calibrated 2025 residual quantities.
emissions_boundary_notes: Residual calibration emissions are represented directly on the residual incumbent method. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from residual end-use coefficients and flow through electricity supply.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit roles are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated residual role calibration layer and official Australian energy and inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical migration from residual role rows into a single role-method incumbent route with demand anchor 1.0.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable technology representation.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into explicit omitted-sector roles or process chains when source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a fixed calibration demand process with explicit commodity inputs or direct emissions.
